TodoTask.title: TodoTask
TodoTask.description: Represents a Moodle scraped activity or a manually entered task.

id.description: Unique identifier of the task (manual or Moodle activity ID)

title.description: Name or title of the task

activityUrl.description: Scraped Moodle activity URL if applicable

type.description: The category of activity or manual task

closureDate.description: ISO date string of completion closure deadline

apertureDateISO.description: ISO date string of opening date

estado_calificacion.description: Moodle localization string of grade state

estado_entrega.description: Moodle localization string of hand-in state

advertencia_preguntas.description: Warning message in quiz type tasks

por_hacer_calificacion.description: True if grade is set but pending review

grupo.description: Scraped student group details if any

moodleUsername.description: Username of the associated Moodle sync

lastSyncedAt.description: Timestamp when this individual task was synced

UserCache.title: UserCache
UserCache.description: Stores cached tasks and sync settings for a specific Moodle username & server.

tasks.description: List of activities and manual tasks for this account

notifications.description: List of notifications/announcements triggered by changes in activities

lastSyncedTime.description: Epoch timestamp of last full sync

/user_data/{userId}.description: Collection mapping Moodle username-server pairs to their synced and manual activities.
